title: The Great Kibble Cat-astrophe
summary: When Seeker discovers his home has been mysteriously overrun by dozens of cats drawn by a surplus of kibble, he faces the challenge of reclaiming his space. From Scratch Cat to a talking cat crew, the feline visitors take over every room and even Seeker's bed. With the arrival of Superhero Izzy and a clever plan involving a trail of seven special treats, the cats are lured away into a custom-made nest. Order is finally restored, allowing Seeker and Scratch Cat to share a unique pot of wet food tea before settling in for a peaceful sleepover.

highlightQuote.text: Well, I just... I just can't stop them. Cats are in charge of their bodies.

transcript.text: What should we tell a story about tonight?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: You think of one.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Hmm... Seeker and... who else?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I said you pick.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Seeker and me? A story about Seeker and Daddy, that's a silly idea.
I don't think so. Maybe our silver cat story cat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: A silver cat story?
No, no, no. Silver... Actually, what about Scratch Cat and Seeker?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Seeker and Scratch Cat. Well, once upon a time...
Ding-dong, said Scratch Cat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Meow-meow, which means 'Who's there?' said Scratch Cat.
Actually, ding-dong.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Who's there?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Scratch Cat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Scratch Cat's there. Hello, said Seeker. Come on in, Scratch Cat. Now, I'm happy to have you here because I need your help.
What is it? Is it a cat thing?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: It's a cat thing. Well, the first cat thing is somebody left me all these kibbles at my house, and I'm a person, so I don't eat kibbles. Do you want any? You cats eat kibbles, right?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes. Now I know my perfect friends who love eating kibbles: Alexander and Jane.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey, Alexander and Jane! Oh, ding-dong Seeker. Here's Silver and Finn, and here's Alexander and Jane.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, suddenly my house is just full of cats. How many cats do we have? Let's see. We've got...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, and Ginger!
And Ginger! Oh my goodness, said Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Oh, and Garfield.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Wow, that's a lot of cats. How many have we got? We've got Scratch Cat, that's one, and then...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then also Nana's new cat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my gosh, I can't even keep track. Ginger and Garfield, that's three...
Alexander and Jane, that's five. And then Ginger and also...
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And what are Nana's new cats called? What are their names?
Actually Garfield and Ginger. Oh, Smokey and also Tomcat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Tomcat. Oh, but I thought the other one was going to be named Peewee.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Peewee and Tomcat. Yes, although Smokey is a very good name.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think we'll name them Smokey.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, 'Well, have a seat everyone.' And he set up little chairs all around a little table, and on the table, he had put a bowl of kibble. But you know what those cats did?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?
They didn't sit in the chair. They're cats! They ran around meowing and purring and...
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Hey cats! Sit in the chairs, please!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Seeker said, 'You know what? I don't think chairs... I don't think chairs are the right thing for cats. The cats just want to be cats. They're just running around.'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Hey cats, come have your kibble! Kibble time! Leap onto the table to a fresh bin of kibble!
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And the cats all went nom-nom-nom-nom and all the cats nibbled the kibble. And Seeker said, 'Where were we? I was going to tell you about something that you could help me with, Scratch Cat, but now my house is full of cats. So I have a new thing you can help me with.'
What is it? Actually, you can tell me. You can tell us.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Well, there's too many cats in my house, said Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Actually, well the cats will hear you just if you tell it loud enough.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: There's too many cats!
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Just if you tell it loud enough.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: But that's what I'm telling you! There's too many cats! Can you... can you help me get some peace and quiet from all these cats? They're just meowing and purring everywhere, all over my house, said Seeker.
Well, I just... I just can't stop them. Cats are in charge of their bodies.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the cats are in charge of their bodies, said Seeker, so we can't just pick them up and carry them out of my house, I guess. What else can we do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then, look who came flying except Superhero Izzy!
Oh, Superhero Izzy! Thank goodness you're here.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And her cat... and Kitty and Kitty's cat crew!
More cats! Oh no, said Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Actually, but Kitty's cat crew says, 'My cat crew doesn't meow and purr, it talks!'
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: You have a talking cat crew? said Seeker. Well, maybe you can help. Can you introduce me to your cat crew?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pixie, Pumpkin, Figaro, Katsumi.
Wow, nice to meet you all. Uh, I'd offer you some kibble, but I'm fresh out because I have a crowd of cats in my house.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And then, and then, and then look! And then the mailman delivers one more bag of kibble!
Oh no, more kibble, said Seeker, for the cat crew.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: The cat... and then the cat crew dig a little hole in the top and eat all the kibble.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh my goodness, I'm out of kibble again, said Seeker. Well, can anyone help me get all these cats out of my house?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Now you need to tell us the thing. And then the cats kept quiet.
Oh. Thank goodness. It was so noisy with the meowing and the purring, I couldn't think, said Seeker. Now I can think of an idea for how to get these cats out of here.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: No, I don't think you should get the cats out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You mean they just live here now? My house is just full of cats? Where am I going to live?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I mean, Dad... Seeker, they'll leave after they're done with... with... with all your cat things.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, that one's napping on the floor. Oh my gosh, I want to go to bed but there's five cats in my bed. And there's cats climbing up my walls and cats prowling around looking for more food. And look, that cat just opened the cabinet to try to find more kibble, but there's no more kibble, cats! How are we going to get them out of here? Hmm. Should we scoop them up in a net and bring them outside?
No! No! No! We could make a nest with treats! And then Isabella gave her bag of treats to Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a bag of treats! That seems useful. And all the cats...

And now, and now, and now Izzy made a nest for them. And then Seeker placed... then all the cats... and then, and then, and then Isabella counted the cats, and then, and then, and then she put the treats.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh. How many treats?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Seven treats.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Seven treats. And I hope that nest that you're making, said Seeker, is outside my house.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Actually, it's outside your house. And then the cats ran out the door, ate their treats, stepped into the nest, and then Isabella carried them and carried them away.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my goodness, said Seeker, finally! All the cats are out of my house. Thank goodness. Thanks for your help, Superhero Izzy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then Scratch... and then Scratch Cat just leaped into the house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, you're back. Welcome back, Scratch Cat.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Heh heh heh.
Well, let's have a nice cup of tea together now that my house isn't full of all those cats anymore, except for just one, that's you. What kind of tea would you like, Scratch Cat?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Kibble tea.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, kibble tea. That sounds delicious. I'll make...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually, wet food.

Wet food tea? I'll make a nice pot of wet food tea for you, and I think I'll have some peppermint tea for me, said Seeker. And he made the two pots of tea, and Seeker and Scratch Cat sat down at the table to drink their tea together.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And then why were all the cats there, do you think?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, 'You know, I wish I knew. Suddenly my house was just full of cats.'
Because they had so... because they thought your house was so cozy that they decided to take a nap everywhere in your house.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: They were just all over the place. It could have had something to do with all that kibble I had too, but now it's gone because they ate it all up. Well... oh, there's cat hair all over the place. I better sweep that up. Sweep, sweep, sweep, sweep.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: What?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: There was cat... cat hair.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Cat hair.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yeah, there was cat hair all over my house from all the cats. Well, thanks for coming over, Scratch Cat. But now I have to go to sleep and thank goodness there are no more cats in my bed so I can curl up and get cozy all by myself.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And Scratch Cat says, 'Can I... can I stay at yours and have a sleepover?'

Oh, that sounds so nice, said Seeker. Okay, let's both brush our teeth. And they both brushed... spit! And then they got into their pajamas, and then they went to sleep. And that's the end of our story.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, I just... [snoring sound].

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Scratch Cat
characters.description: A friendly cat visitor who knocks on Seeker's door and eventually stays for a sleepover.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: A poised driver and student at Ginger Catasorry, this feline friend to Dimetar and Scratch Cat manages a digital Tamagotchi empire from the confines of a lunchbox. After recently representing Silver during the playdate, their steady paw was led far from the morning commute into the treacherous depths of the dark forest, where they navigated the shadows alongside Jane.

characters.name: Jane
characters.description: Dimetar’s matronly childhood companion is a kindhearted cat and daring ship’s pilot, a friend to Finn, Isabella, and Scratch Cat who navigates the expedition toward Mouse Castle and the road to Cadasori. Her cockpit is a warm sanctuary distinguished by a "love you" sticker and a cabin teeming with whiskered passengers, reflecting the same tenderness she first offered Silver. Though she maintains a bold pace, she is easily swayed by snacks at Seeker’s house or waylaid within the tangled depths of the dark forest. An adventurous spirit with whimsical desires, she currently dreams of a special little hat adorned with rainbow feathers, glitter, and a miniature fishy pond to crown her nautical ensemble.

characters.name: Silver
characters.description: Immortalized in the stone of the Great Library yet reborn in Cat World as a small, hungry kitten, Izzy is a brave companion who now traverses the heart of Limbo. Communicating through an ancient, rhythmic language of resonant purrs and wielding a masterfully handled magical can opener, this tiny spirit balances her arcane legacy with a newfound, desperately urgent need for snuggles.

characters.name: Finn
characters.description: A resident of Cat World and loyal companion to Mama, Finncat is a meticulous research collector who documents the world through investigative sniffing. Alongside their peer Silver, they navigate their domain with scholarly curiosity, often pausing mid-voyage for a sudden, dramatic flop. While currently thwarted by the formidable challenge of an unopened food can, this diligent scholar occasionally graces the room for a fleeting minute during storytelling, lending a brief, discerning presence to the narrative before returning to their investigations.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: A soft, round, and silver-coated feline, this exceptionally fluffy educator is one of Minnie and Mickey’s own kittens grown into a figure of quiet authority. Known for daintily distributing napkins with velvet paws and commuting to school behind the wheel, the gray-furred teacher balances his role on Nana’s welcoming committee with a life of polite, helpful service. Whether presiding over his humble sanctuary—the very cage Seeker once coveted—or sustaining himself on crunchy kibble and savory wet food, he remains a steady presence, most recently seen trading his classroom duties for the shadows of a secret closet hideout alongside Garfield.

characters.name: Garfield
characters.description: Minnie and Mickey’s intrepid kitten is a seasoned morning commuter, navigating the school run to reach Seeker’s sanctuary for heavy napping and premium kibble. A social fixture known for sharing twilight dinners with Ginger or waiting expectantly at Nana’s for a warm welcome, they occasionally trade their public life for the quiet solitude of a closet, sequestering themselves away with a treasured hoard of toys.

characters.name: Smokey
characters.description: One of Nana's new cats who ends up joining the feline gathering.

characters.name: Tomcat
characters.description: A cat who is part of the large group that overruns Seeker's house.

characters.name: Peewee
characters.description: A potential name briefly considered for one of the visiting cats.

characters.name: Superhero Izzy
characters.description: Isabella’s brave, caped alter-ego is a courageous guardian of the kaleidoscopic Rainbow Frasgle World. A soaring protector, she descends from the vibrant skies alongside a crew of talking cats to lend their whiskered wisdom and help Seeker restore order to the unfolding house chaos.

characters.name: Kitty
characters.description: Isabella’s loyal companion and a valiant superhero, this feline-costumed commander harnesses agile, cat-like powers to lead an intrepid crew through the drifting wonders of Balloon World. Bound by a mission of guardianship, she navigates the whimsical floating realm on daring adventures, rescuing lost treasures and protecting every creature she encounters.

characters.name: Pixie
characters.description: A nimble operative in Kitty’s elite superhero squad, this scholarly feline balances tactical missions and Ginger Catasorry studies with a profound appreciation for restorative slumber. Currently navigating a perilous underground expedition, the talking adventurer greets each waking moment with a signature "Hello, hello," shifting seamlessly from a quiet nap to the sharp-eyed focus required for subterranean survival.

characters.name: Pumpkin
characters.description: A student of Ginger Catasorry and veteran of Kitty the Superhero’s specialized troop, this feline translates the tactical intuition of dark gopher tunnels into rigorous academic study. Despite their combat experience, they harbor a paralyzing fear of being eaten by their subterranean foes—initially trembling at the mere sight of the big gopher—a dread that frequently sends the scholar scurrying to hide between Izzy’s legs for sanctuary.

characters.name: Figaro
characters.description: A sharp-witted scholar of the Ginger Catasorry, this feline hero balances rigorous academic discipline with the street-wise loyalty of Kitty’s superhero troop. Driven by a restless spirit, they are the first to slip into the night in search of adventure, prowling for action while the rest of the crew sleeps.

characters.name: Katsumi
characters.description: A distinguished scholar of the Ginger Catasorry and elite member of the academy’s talking cat crew, this feline has emerged from a long dormancy to join Kitty’s cat troop. Balancing studious discipline with silver-tongued eloquence, they bring the full weight of their feline intellect and the rare gift of speech to the unfolding journey.

characters.name: Mailman
characters.description: A person who unknowingly contributes to the chaos by delivering even more kibble.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

places.name: Seeker's House
places.description: Perched at the edge of a mountain, this warm stone sanctuary—Seeker’s original residence and whimsical home shared with Uncle Crisco—has evolved from a secret vault into the purring, chaotic heart of a massive feline gala. Within its well-lit halls where Muppets gather for snacks and scientific discussions, lies a special hidden closet where Seeker brews an enchanted collection of potions that shimmer in every imaginable color.
